title: This Uni-1 model looks seriously good. Look at the results on the RISEBench benchmark: Uni-1 is the new state-of-the-art model here. This evaluates how good the model is at: • decomposing complex editing instructions • maintaining scene coherence • generating visual outputs that make sense

content.summary: This Uni-1 model looks seriously good. Look at the results on the RISEBench benchmark: Uni-1 is the new state-of-the-art model here. This evaluates how good the model is at: • decomposing complex editing instructions • maintaining scene coherence • generating visual outputs that make sense Luma (@LumaLabsAI) Uni-1 is here! A new kind of model that thinks and generates pixels simultaneously. Less artificial. More intelligent. Video — https://nitter.net/LumaLabsAI/status/2036107826498544110#m
